executive_summary: Twelve of thirteen clients flagged needs_attention, with stalls concentrated in Ads (creative burnout, access blocks, campaign decisions) and CRM (tracking setup, permissions, handoffs). Quality HVAC and Flow Company carry the longest-stalled items—38–51 days and 20–24 days respectively. Liferun and Healing Helps remain on_track; new prospect conversations (Summit Bags, Citrus Smiles, Sanjeev Sharma, Parth Patel) highlight recurring themes of lead follow-up gaps and trust-first partnerships.

departments_overview.summary: Moderate load with stalls on tracking setup (Full Smile 13d), permissions (Justice Consumer Law 9d), handoffs (Liferun 9d, Steel Round Bars 16d), and field-mapping publish delays.

Heavy load; stuck on creative refresh (Billy Doe Meats 6d), access (Cotton Collections 11d, Meta 44d at Vous Physique), client approvals (Maadi Law 10d), and critical fixes at Quality HVAC (38–51d stalled).
Light load; Justice Consumer Law video content delayed 9 days, slowing growth.
Low activity; Flow Company SEO update silent 24 days, Vous Physique automations stalled 91 days.

potential_clients.name: Citrus Smiles

items.blurb: This meeting with Citrus Smiles emphasized a philosophy-driven approach to the partnership, prioritizing trust and quality over transactional metrics. The discussion focused on measuring real business

This follow-up meeting with Citrus Smiles continued the trust-centered discussion, emphasizing quality patient outcomes over volume metrics. The conversation built on a foundation of a decade of relia

potential_clients.summary: The relationship with Citrus Smiles has centered on building a philosophy-driven partnership that prioritizes trust, quality, and long-term value over transactional metrics. Across both meetings, the conversation has consistently emphasized measuring real business impact through patient walk-ins and appointment completions rather than lead volume alone. The client has expressed strong confidence in trusted collaborators, drawing on a foundation of a decade of reliable work, and seeks to integrate partners into their existing circle of trusted relationships. The focus remains on fostering authentic communication and aligning all stakeholders on quality outcomes and meaningful results rather than superficial metrics.
action_items: Foster deeper trust and transparency with the client to enable mutual evaluation and collaboration effectiveness.
Pursue integration into the existing circle of trusted partners and strengthen relationships to build on long-term trust and reliability.
Provide detailed patient data counts to fulfill the request for transparency on the number of patient walk-ins relevant to the business context.
potential_clients.likelihood_reason: Philosophy discussions and trust-building but no pricing agreed, timeline set, or concrete commitment made.

potential_clients.name: Parth Patel

items.blurb: This meeting with Parth Patel discussed marketing for his four-year-old dental practice serving a rural community of 9,000 to 10,000 people with low competition and expected population growth to 15,00
This follow-up meeting with Parth Patel reviewed his rural dental practice's strong digital presence with over 600 five-star Google reviews and current $500 per month Google Ads spend. The discussion

potential_clients.summary: The relationship with Parth Patel has focused on marketing his four-year-old dental practice in a rural community of 9,000 to 10,000 people with expected growth to 15,000 to 16,000. The practice has a strong digital presence with over 600 five-star Google reviews and currently spends $500 per month on Google Ads, but has limited social media activity due to an older demographic and shows 823 monthly organic visits with few top Google rankings. A comprehensive $5,000 per month retainer was proposed covering integrated SEO, ads, content, video, and CRM services, with an additional $1,500 to $3,000 suggested for ad spend, positioning the agency as an extended marketing department. Parth is reviewing multiple agency proposals before making a decision, with growth plans tied to an upcoming office move and population expansion expected in three to five years.
action_items: Review Flow Company's marketing deck and compare it with other marketing agencies contacted this week, then provide feedback and decision.
Send Flow Company's marketing deck and detailed proposal including services, pricing, and case studies to Parth Patel for review.
potential_clients.likelihood_reason: $5,000/month retainer proposed, reviewing deck this week against competitors, clear next-step decision timeline.

potential_clients.name: Ridge Road Dentistry

items.blurb: This meeting with Mouawia Ghiba from Ridge Road Dentistry addressed significant marketing challenges including poor lead quality from past agencies and a sharp decline in organic search traffic from 4

potential_clients.summary: This meeting with Mouawia Ghiba from Ridge Road Dentistry addressed significant marketing challenges including poor lead quality from past agencies and a sharp decline in organic search traffic from 468 to 138 monthly visits after a website rebuild. The practice lacks an internal marketing team and dedicated intake staff for lead vetting, which is causing wasted marketing spend and follow-up capacity problems. While the agency offers AI-driven campaigns at $3,500 to $5,000 per month, it cannot provide the call center lead qualification services that Ridge Road requires, creating a potential deal-breaker for engagement.
action_items: Continue searching for an agency that provides both comprehensive marketing and call center lead qualification services to improve lead quality and conversion.
Consider moving forward with Implant Machine agency after receiving feedback and evaluating their all-in-one marketing and call center solution.
Hire an additional front desk or intake person to improve lead handling capacity and follow-up effectiveness at Ridge Road Dentistry.
Share feedback and research findings on Implant Machine agency with Mouawia to assist in evaluation.
potential_clients.likelihood_reason: Agency cannot provide required call center services; client continuing search for all-in-one solution elsewhere.

potential_clients.name: Sharma Dental

items.blurb: This meeting with Sanjeev Sharma addressed critical lead conversion issues at Sharma Dental, where up to 300 leads are not being followed up on in a timely manner, resulting in lost patient appointmen

This follow-up meeting with Sharma Dental continued addressing their lead conversion challenges, including poor follow-up processes and low weekend staff motivation causing lost patient visits. The di

potential_clients.summary: The relationship with Sharma Dental has focused on addressing critical lead conversion and follow-up issues where up to 300 leads are not being contacted in a timely manner, resulting in lost patient appointments and wasted ad spend. The practice currently works with multiple fragmented vendors with no unified tracking system, has low weekend staff motivation, and suffers from a severe organic traffic gap of approximately 248 monthly visits compared to competitors' 5,000. An integrated solution was proposed at $5,000 per month covering SEO, paid ads, CRM, and automation with a team of 5-7 specialists and $3,000 baseline ad spend, including automated lead engagement systems that trigger texts for missed calls and consolidate messages into one inbox. The proposal includes plans to integrate with their Dentrix Ascend EMR system, coordinate with existing Google Ads providers, perform SEO and website structure fixes, and implement a dual advertising strategy using Google Ads for high-intent local patients and Meta ads for awareness with unique phone numbers for precise lead source tracking.
action_items: Follow up with Sanjeev Sharma next week via text message to discuss potential next steps for engagement and respond to proposal.
Provide details on current staff and their follow-up workflow for leads to coordinate intake and marketing integration.
Coordinate integration setup and customization of marketing and CRM platform with Sharma Dental, especially EMR integration with Dentrix Ascend when they transition.
Collaborate with existing Google Ads providers at Sharma Dental to streamline marketing efforts and avoid duplicated work.
Perform SEO and website structure fixes including optimization of header tags, Google Business Profile, and consolidation of Facebook pages and Google profiles.
Prepare customized CRM pipeline and automation workflows aligned with Sharma Dental's intake and clinical process.
potential_clients.likelihood_reason: $5,000/month proposal delivered, follow-up scheduled next week, detailed integration and workflow planning already underway.

potential_clients.name: Summit Bags

items.blurb: This meeting focused on launching a Meta advertising campaign for Summit Bags, a business selling bags with about 70-75% gross margin and annual sales of 150-180 units. The team discussed starting wit

This follow-up meeting with Summit Bags continued planning for the Meta advertising campaign launching in August. The discussion covered a sales-focused advertising strategy with brand awareness funne

potential_clients.summary: The relationship with Summit Bags has focused on launching a Meta advertising campaign for their bag business, which has about 70-75% gross margin and annual sales of 150-180 units. The team has planned a sales-focused advertising strategy starting with a $50 per day test budget in August, using existing video content from influencers and social media, with brand awareness funneling to retargeting to gather data insights. A 50% revenue share model was proposed for the first three months with flexibility after a trial period, and plans include simplifying the Shopify checkout process and integrating with Meta Shop to reduce friction and boost conversions. The campaign is set to launch in August once Sohib gains access to Facebook Business Manager to review and select the best existing content assets.
action_items: Provide agency with access to Facebook Business Manager by adding Sohib Boundaoui as manager to facilitate ad management and content sourcing.
Send new and existing video content assets, including updated Haram Leather video, via WhatsApp to Sohib Boundaoui for agency review and campaign use.
Review all Facebook and Instagram content and select best assets for initial Meta ads campaign.
Prepare project files and proposals, including calculating suitable revenue share percentage.
potential_clients.likelihood_reason: August launch confirmed, 50% revenue share agreed for three months, granting agency access and sending assets.

meetings_digest.title: Summit Bags
key_points: Marketing Focus: Prioritize revenue-driving Meta ads with targeted sales, starting with a $50/day test budget for one week to reach ideal customers.
Revenue Share Model: Start with a 50% revenue share, revisited every three months; higher sales can reduce shipping cost pressure.
Content Use: Review and consolidate existing video assets; Sohib added to Facebook Business Manager for direct content access.
Website Improvements: Simplify checkout and integrate Shopify with Meta Shop to boost conversion and reduce purchase friction.
Campaign Timeline: Launch initial Meta ads in August, budgeting $900 for 30 days, starting with awareness then retargeting high-engagement users.
action_items: Amer Sweis

key_points: Lead Generation: 211 leads since Jan 1 at $19 cost with Google Ads proving higher quality than Meta; organic traffic grew 6x.
Conversion Tracking: Need clearer lead-to-patient data; existing patients confuse lead counts; plan HIPAA-compliant dashboard for spend, leads, and revenue.
CRM Integration: GHL syncing with Open Dental but bugs cause lead/patient tagging errors; open dental preferred for scheduling; automation planned.
Communication Tracking: GHL calls/texts help data but office phone preferred for calls; texts from GHL number confuse patients, will switch to office number.
Strategic Alignment: Monthly reviews planned; clear roles needed in lead generation, capture, revenue ops; budget caution stressed due to cash flow limits.
